title: Waystones Resprite
description: Updates the items and models in the waystones mod to fit in with new game versions!!
body:
A small resource pack that remakes the sprites and models in the Waystones mod\
Made to make the blocks and items fit in better with the game's current artstyle!


<details>
<summary>Currently resprited / modeled:</summary>

- Warp stone
- Attuned shard
- Crumbling attuned shard
- Warp dust
- All 3 scrolls
- Andesite Waystone
- Sandy Waystone
- Mossy Waystone
- Warp plate
- Portstone
- Sharestone

</details>




### BEFORE: 
![The items and blocks in the mod without using the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a9a24413a0242f27578454ac017facdf725f66e.png)

### AFTER:
![The items and blocks in the mod using the resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f62e26908efafd14e7da4388c5330681a49cab5.png)

[**Waystones mod**](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones)\
**Does not require optifine or any other mods.**

Current issues are:
- Outlines don't match up (I dont know if that can be fixed)
